zh.Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, England: 英國爾桑頓 勒 波斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Thornton於大約1222年出生在英國爾艾格頓時，她的父親Lord Randal Thornton18歲，母親Avice de Kingsely23歲。她於1254年與David Egerton在英國英格蘭爾艾格頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1290年在英國爾馬爾帕斯享年69歲。

zh-hans.Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, England: 英国爾桑頓 勒 波斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Thornton于大约1222年出生在英国爾艾格頓时，她的父亲Lord Randal Thornton18岁，母亲Avice de Kingsely23岁。她于1254年与David Egerton在英国英格兰爾艾格頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1290年在英国爾馬爾帕斯享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thornton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Thornton was born about 1222, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, her father, Lord Randal Thornton, was 18 and her mother, Avice de Kingsely, was 23. She married David Egerton in 1254, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1290, in Malpas, Cheshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Thornton est née environ 1222, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Randal Thornton, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Avice de Kingsely, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé David Egerton en 1254, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1290, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Thornton um 1222 in Egerton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Randal Thornton 18 und ihre Mutter Avice de Kingsely 23. Sie hat 1254 in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom David Egerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1290 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Malpas, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Thornton è nata il circa 1222 nel Egerton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Lord Randal Thornton, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Avice de Kingsely, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato David Egerton nel 1254, nel Egerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1290, nel Malpas, Cheshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Thorntonが約1222年にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父Lord Randal Thorntonは18歳，母Avice de Kingselyは23歳であった。1254年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンでDavid Egertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1290年にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Thornton(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Randal Thornton(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice de Kingsely(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1254년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 거턴에서 David Egerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Thornton nasceu aproximadamente 1222, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Randal Thornton, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Avice de Kingsely, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com David Egerton em 1254, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1290, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Thornton родилась около 1222 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Randal Thornton было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice de Kingsely, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Egerton в 1254 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1290 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Thornton nació aproximadamente 1222, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Randal Thornton, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Avice de Kingsely, tenía 23 años. Se casó con David Egerton en 1254, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1290, en Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
